Analyze U.S. fixed income trade and reference data

-   Capabilities

    [](/connectors-capabilities/read-only)
    
-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://www.ice.com/ieoauoau)[Privacy Policy](https://www.ice.com/privacy-security-center)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#d0b9b4a3b3bcb9b5bea4a3a5a0a0bfa2a490b9b3b5feb3bfbd)
    

Query real-time and historical bond trades across corporate, agency and securitized products reported to FINRA TRACE, and municipal bond trades reported to MSRB RTRS. Look up bond reference data including coupon details and maturity dates.

You can use ICE Data Services to:

**Ask a question:**  
"What can you help me do with ICE Data Services?"

**Explore your data:**  
"Summarize the most recent activity in ICE Data Services."
